dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Roger... came down with a terminal disease...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We were told it was impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: from the twin capes....!? How nostalgic.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: C... Crocus... you went that far....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So after you conquered the seas...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He looked like he was enjoying it.
